headline: Can ADI's Strong Cash Flow and Inventory Strategy Drive Future Growth?
summary: Analog Devices' strong cash flow, low capital needs and strategic inventory build support growth while keeping its balance sheet and cash conversion resilient.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $550
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst C.J. Muse   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $510 to $550.

raw.headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $550

headline: Stifel Raises PT on Analog Devices (ADI), Keeps a Buy
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is one of the High Growth Semiconductor Stocks to Buy Now. Recently, on June 24, Stifel raised the firm’s price target on Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) from $450 to $498 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. ​The rating follows the company’s strong Q2 2026 earnings posted on May 20. […]
